title: Fix congress UI - layout, roster, session history

log.context: Fix congress UI - layout, roster, session history

All fixes are live. Here's a summary of what was changed in `/home/clungus/work/hello-world/congress.html`:

**1. Session list visibility**
- Changed `style.display = ''` to `style.display = 'block'` — the empty-string approach relies on CSS defaulting, which was ambiguous in the flex container context. Explicit `block` is reliable.
- Added `console.error('[congress] loadSessionList error:', e)` in the catch block so failures are visible in the browser console.
